## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

Describe the change you'd like to see. Include any relevant function signatures, storage changes, or state machine updates.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you evaluated and why you ruled them out.

Links to related issues, external references, or design documents.
